query: bash -c "source ~/hermes-venv/bin/activate && cd /mnt/c/civibbs/pipeline/done_claude_opus2/ml_trae && python3 -c \"import importlib.util, tempfile, os, shutil; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(\"plugin_storage\", \"create_topo_storage_with_copies/execute.py\"); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); tmp = tempfile.mkdtemp(); r = mod.execute({\"storage_id\": \"s1\", \"base_dir\": tmp, \"copy_count\": 2}); print(r); shutil.rmtree(tmp, True)\" 2>&1"
